subcodes.first_line: The resplendent and radiant light from the Kingdom of existence doth envelop that spot whereon thy pure blood was shed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: النور الساطع اللامع من ملکوت الوجود تغشی تلک البقعه التی سفک علیها دمک الطاهر
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for martyrs, @visitation Tablets, @high station of the true believer
